signals.title: Jeffries: Democrats aren't focused on Trump impeachment 'at this moment'

signals.summary: The DOJ's $1.8 billion fund faced strong criticism because it could have compensated people convicted of crimes related to the Jan. 6, 2021, U.S. Capitol Riot.

signals.title: DOE issues guidance ending gas-to-electric appliance rebates
signals.summary: The Department of Energy will instead allow rebates for “upgrading HVAC and appliances only from existing electric equipment to more efficient electric equipment.”

signals.title: Iowa Democratic Senate primary could shape Democrats' path to Senate majority
signals.summary: Iowa's Senate primary between state Rep. Josh Turek and state Sen. Zach Wahls could be critical as Democrats look to take back power in Congress.

signals.summary: Asia-Pacific markets opened higher even amid concerns over volatile oil prices with the Strait of Hormuz remaining closed.

signals.title: Massachusetts ‘vehicle-to-everything’ demonstration hints at EV batteries’ grid potential
signals.summary: Certain light-duty vehicles have the potential to earn around $3,000 per summer, and school buses $12,000, by enrolling in the state’s virtual power plant, a state program manager said.

signals.title: What’s on the mind of EEI conference attendees? Labor, AI, affordability and more.
signals.summary: Utility Dive talked to registrants before the conference to hear how industry changes are impacting their work.

signals.title: Data centers can raise temperatures, energy burdens in nearby neighborhoods: ASU study
signals.summary: Each one-degree increase in temperature will drive a higher use of air conditioning, which in turn will put more heat into the area, creating “a feedback loop,” researchers concluded.

signals.title: SEC proposes rule rescinding Biden-era climate risk disclosures
signals.summary: The agency’s proposal calls the 2024 climate disclosure rules “a dramatic overreach of the Commission’s statutory authority and, independently, unsound as a matter of policy.”

signals.title: Eversource project ‘epitomizes’ flawed transmission reviews: New England states
signals.summary: New England “severely lacks” oversight of asset condition projects like Eversource Energy’s X-178 transmission project, the New England States Committee on Electricity told FERC.

signals.title: Iran has mined 'large segments' of Hormuz Strait, Secretary of State Rubio says
signals.summary: Rubio called Iran's actions illegal in testimony to the Senate Foreign Relations Committee.

signals.title: The CFTC has sparked a potential revolution on Wall Street. Exchange stocks are dropping
signals.summary: Investors are worried about increased competition for the traditional exchanges that have long dominated on Wall Street.

signals.title: Palo Alto Networks tops earnings as AI fuels cybersecurity urgency
signals.summary: The beat comes on lowered expectations, after the company gave disappointing guidance in February that fell short of analyst estimates.

signals.title: Jim Cramer says look to buy these 5 stocks outside the AI trade for diversification
signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said investors should consider adding exposure to out-of-favor sectors if investors begin rotating away from high-flying technology stocks.

signals.title: Ulta shares pop as beauty retailer beats Wall Street expectations and hikes earnings outlook
signals.summary: Ulta Beauty beat on the top and bottom lines for its fiscal first quarter on Tuesday as CEO Kecia Steelman praised the company's strategy.

signals.title: How the U.S. solar industry can solve its 53K-worker challenge
signals.summary: The solar workforce challenge is significant but solvable. Here’s how to close the gap.

signals.title: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon says markets are in 'greed' mode as AI companies seek billions
signals.summary: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon's comments come as investors prepare for what will be one of the busiest periods for equity issuance in years.

signals.title: Microsoft unveils new AI models to lessen reliance on OpenAI and lower costs for developers
signals.summary: At its Build developer conference, Microsoft announced a series of generative AI models to try and crack a market controlled by OpenAI, Anthropic and Google.

signals.title: Traders say Karen Bass and Spencer Pratt will advance to runoff in high-profile L.A. mayoral race
signals.summary: Los Angeles voters go to the polls Tuesday. If no candidate receives more than 50%, the top-two vote getters will advance to a November runoff.

signals.title: Why BlackRock's Rick Rieder feels 'a bit more relaxed' about AI bull market than dotcom era
signals.summary: 'I think you gotta stay in,' says the top BlackRock investing official, as earnings growth and cash to be reinvested in stocks support the AI bull market.

signals.title: Victoria's Secret shares spike 40% after big earnings beat, raised sales outlook
signals.summary: Victoria's Secret has been in the midst of a turnaround under CEO Hillary Super, who said the company is winning over young shoppers across all incomes.

signals.title: Access to real-time electricity data should be a basic consumer right
signals.summary: The technology exists and the infrastructure is there. What is missing is a requirement that customers have access to data on their electricity use, writes Joel Hicks at the University of Oregon.

signals.title: Load growth can help modernize grid, but cost-shift risks are significant: Concentric
signals.summary: On-site generation can be an interim solution as projects await full grid interconnection, but “widespread reliance on off‑grid systems is not a durable path forward,” Concentric said in a new report.

signals.title: Job openings in April surged to 7.6 million, the highest in nearly two years
signals.summary: The Bureau of Labor Statistics reported that available employment hit 7.6 million for the month, a surge of 731,000 from the prior month.

signals.title: The top 10 highest-paying jobs for teens in the U.S.—No. 1 isn't retail or food service
signals.summary: Babysitting may not be your ultimate career path, but having a job as a teenager can build transferable skills for young workers, according to experts.

signals.title: Polymarket closes its first block trade as prediction markets push for Wall Street adoption
signals.summary: Prediction market platforms have increasingly looked to institutional traders, not individual ones, as the next venue for growth.

signals.title: Anthropic expands Mythos to 150 additional organizations in more than 15 countries
signals.summary: Anthropic initially released Project Glasswing to about 50 partners in April to test the model for cybersecurity flaws.

signals.title: Commodities regulator alleges Winklevosses' Gemini crypto exchange was politically targeted
signals.summary: CFTC chair Michael Selig said the agency's enforcement action against Gemini was part of a broader campaign against the crypto industry under President Biden.

signals.title: Audemars Piguet's watch prices remain stable after controversial Swatch collab
signals.summary: The Royal Pop collection of brightly colored watches on lanyards is part of AP's longer-term strategy of attracting the next generation of collectors.

signals.title: Microsoft and Google are late to AI coding, but 'absolutely critical' they compete for growth
signals.summary: Coding tools are becoming an increasingly big target for Google and Microsoft as they try to catch up to Anthropic and OpenAI.
